summary: Bookmarked carousel position navigating away from RSN page
description:
GIVEN a user is on a RSN page
AND focus is present in a carousel
AND focus is not assigned to the first item in a carousel

steps.action:
WHEN the user navigates away from the RSN page
AND the user navigates back to the same RSN page
steps.result: THEN the previously focused carousel has been reset to its original order
